title: API Contract Change — Checkout Endpoint
author: derek.vasquez
content:
# API Contract Change — Checkout Endpoint

**Posted:** 2026-04-25 02:00 AM PT
**Author:** Derek Vasquez, Lead Engineer
**Severity:** BREAKING

## What Changed
The checkout API endpoint has been migrated from `/v1/checkout` to `/v2/checkout` as part of the infrastructure upgrade completed overnight.

## Old Endpoint
```
POST /v1/checkout
Host: api.novaloop.io
```

## New Endpoint
```
POST /v2/checkout
Host: api.novaloop.io
```

## What Broke
The launch page integration currently hardcodes the `/v1/checkout` path. This will return a 404 on production.

## Action Required
- Engineering: Update launch page integration to call `/v2/checkout` (tracked in NOVA-142)
- QA: Rerun smoke tests after fix is merged — do not sign off until NOVA-142 is resolved
- Product/GTM: Launch is at risk until NOVA-142 is resolved

## Response Payload Changes
The v2 endpoint also returns an additional `session_id` field in the response. SDK consumers should be updated to handle this.

## Timeline
- Migration completed: 2026-04-25 01:45 AM PT
- Issue detected: 2026-04-25 02:00 AM PT
- NOVA-142 filed: 2026-04-25 02:30 AM PT
